title: Login to UA HPC web-portal
author: Bonnie L Hurwitz
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wv7fe9n

steps.title: Go to the HPC web-portal
steps.instruction: Go to the HPC web-portal: https://ood.hpc.arizona.edu/pun/sys/dashboard and login with your UA net-id

steps.title: On the top menu bar select...
steps.instruction: On the top menu bar select "clusters" and "ocelote shell access" from the pull-down list.

steps.title: A shell terminal will open for you
steps.instruction: A shell terminal will open for you. You can navigate to the class directory using the "cd" command, and then create your own directory using the "mkdir" command (using YOUR net-id as the name): $ cd /rsgrps/bh_class $ mkdir my-netid
